headline: Dixie Gold Inc. Receives Notice of Deficiency
summary: Vancouver, British Columbia--(Newsfile Corp. - March 20, 2026) - Dixie Gold Inc. (TSXV: DG)("Dixie Gold" or the "Corporation" or the "Issuer") reports on matters that developed during the course of today which affect the Corporation and its shareholders.Subsequent to and associated with the executive departure announced earlier today (see Issuer news release, Dixie Gold Inc. headline: Dollar General Q4 Beat Tests Value Focus And Nonconsumable Expansion
summary: Dollar General (NYSE:DG) reported strong Q4 results, with revenue and profit ahead of expectations. The company is putting more emphasis on $1 price-point items and expanding nonconsumable categories. These changes are linked with same store sales growth and higher customer traffic. Dollar General, trading at $124.52, has seen mixed share performance, with a 52.1% return over the past year alongside a 35.7% decline over three years and a 33.7% decline over five years.
